blocks.body: Word order in questions and negatives differs from affirmative sentences. Auxiliary verbs and a special order of elements are required.

{ "title": "7. Short synopsis", "items": [ "Yes/No question: Aux + Subject + Verb (Do you like...?)", "Wh-question: Wh-word + Aux + Subject + Verb (Where do you...?)", "Wh-subject: without auxiliary verb (Who called you?' can't.", "Negative form: Subject + Aux + not + Verb (I don't like...)", "To be and modal verbs do not need do/does/did.", "In conversation, contractions are common: don't, doesn't, can't." ] }
